examples: Normally, the seller is obligated to prepay the ocean freight.
In their previous hosting service they had to prepay for a month at a time.
It may be advantageous to delay payments in one year and prepay them in the next year to bunch the expenses in one year.
If you prepay your tax six months ahead of time, you are losing money.
It makes little financial sense to prepay, if there is a chance you may face foreclosure.
